raw.message: Create your own epic robot builds and dominate!

hook.summary: High-intensity mech combat showing a spider-like robot destroying an enemy.
hook.visual_action: A multi-armed robot fires heavy machine guns at a target in a desert canyon.

scene_flow: Spider-mech engages an enemy robot behind cover in a desert environment.
Enemy is destroyed, triggering a 'KILL' notification.
Mech advances and engages a second enemy at close range.
Second enemy is destroyed, triggering a 'DOUBLE KILL' notification.
Final logo screen with game title and call to action.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy tactical combat and customizable mechs.
